overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a cowboy riding a horse along a dirt trail beside a river, then crossing through the shallow water. The scene features natural wilderness with rocky cliffs, green grasslands, and scattered trees under a partly cloudy afternoon sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside dirt trail through grassy hills

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a steady trot along the winding dirt trail, keeping the river to the right

entered.detail: temporary wooden structure visible briefly at the start of the trail
winding dirt path through the grassland
calm river running parallel to the trail
rolling green hills covered in grass and wildflowers
large tan rock formations and cliffs across the river
scattered pine trees on the hillside
leafy green trees lining the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a wooden structure beside the trail, then continues along a dirt path winding through grassy hills. The river flows parallel to the trail on the right, with rocky cliffs and scattered trees filling the background under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank approach with railroad bridge in distance

events.description: horse leaves the dirt trail and steps into the shallow river water

agents.ego_description: guiding the horse down the rocky slope toward the river, then entering the water to begin the crossing

entered.detail: metal railroad bridge spanning the river in the distance
rocky ground and boulders along the riverbank
pebble and stone shoreline of the river

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes rockier as it descends toward the river. A railroad bridge becomes visible in the distance on the right. The horse slows as it navigates the rocky bank and enters the shallow water around the 35-second mark, transitioning from land to water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with rocky banks

events.description: two figures become visible sitting on the opposite riverbank

agents.ego_description: wading through the knee-deep river water, moving steadily toward the opposite bank where two people are resting

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on the rocky riverbank, appearing to rest or fish

entered.detail: two figures resting on the rocky shore of the river

segments.scene_description: The horse wades through the clear, shallow water of the river. Two people are visible sitting on the rocky shore ahead on the right. The railroad bridge shifts from the right to the left side of the frame as the crossing progresses, and the destination shore draws nearer.

events.description: horse climbs out of the river onto the rocky bank

agents.ego_description: riding the horse up the rocky slope and out of the river, reaching the opposite bank

entered.detail: continuation of the dirt trail on the far side of the river

segments.scene_description: The horse exits the water onto the rocky shore, completing the river crossing. The dirt trail continues on this side of the river, and the two figures on the bank are left behind as the camera moves forward onto dry land.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a riverside trail that transitions from a grassy hillside into a shallow river crossing. It begins by passing a wooden structure and winding through green hills beside a flowing river, with rocky cliffs and scattered trees under a partly cloudy sky. As the terrain becomes rockier, the camera descends toward the water's edge, bringing a distant railroad bridge into view before the horse enters the shallow river. The scene then shifts to a slow wade through clear water, passing two figures resting on the rocky shore while the railroad bridge moves across the frame. Finally, the camera emerges from the river onto the opposite rocky bank, leaving the figures behind as it returns to the dry dirt trail.
